semanticCore: Protector, defender, guardian, ruler, refuge, or patron helper

keyDerivations.meaning: Protector, defender, guardian, refuge, or ruler who takes charge

figurativeOrRareUsages: وَإِذَا أَرَادَ اللَّهُ بِقَوْمٍ سُوءًا فَلَا مَرَدَّ لَهُ ۚ وَمَا لَهُمْ مِنْ دُونِهِ مِنْ وَالٍ (13:11): And when God intends ill for a people, there is no repelling it, and they have besides Him no protector/defender.
summaryEn: The root denotes a guardian or defender who takes charge of affairs (Wal), declaring that when God decrees destruction for a nation, no patron exists to shield them.
summaryAr: يمثل هذا الجذر الحامي والناصر والمدافع والوالي الذي يتولى الدفاع عن المقابل ودفع المكروه عنه (وال)، نافياً وجود أي ناصر يحمي الكفار من عقاب الله.
rawText: أَوَّلُ First, and former; preceding all others, and preceding another. See art. أول === أَوَائِلُ السُّوَرِ The first parts, or beginnings, of the chapters of the Kur-án. === جَآءَ فِى أَوَائِلِ القَوْمِ He came among the first comers of the people. (Msb.) === And الأَوَائِلُ The people of former ages; as also الأَوَّلُونَ. === لَقِيتُهُ عَامًا أَوَّلَ means I met him [in a former year.] before this year, though by several years. (Alee El-Kári, in his Expos. of the K, from Seer; cited in the margin of a copy of the K; art. اول.) See عَامٌ. وَأَلَ 1 : see آلَ, in art. اول, in two places.
